title: RB Leipzig’s Christoph Baumgartner ruled out of World Cup
original_text:
Baumgartner’s diagnosis was confirmed following an MRI scan on Tuesday morning.
“This is of course very bitter news for Christoph and for us as a team,” explained Austria head coach Ralf Rangnick. “He’s an important player and a key figure within our squad. Now we’re giving him our full support in his recovery.”

Baumgartner finished 2025/26 as Leipzig’s top scorer, returning 13 goals and providing eight assists in 33 Bundesliga outings to help Ole Werner’s charges secure a place in next season’s UEFA Champions League.
Austria’s World Cup campaign gets under way against Jordan on 17 June, before games against holders Argentina (22 June) and Algeria (28 June).
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
